channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AVAX] Avax Apparels Announces 3:1 Bonus Issue with Record Date on April 07, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd. has announced a bonus issue of equity shares in the ratio of 3:1, i.e., three bonus equity shares for every one fully paid-up equity share. The record date for determining the entitlement of shareholders has been fixed as Tuesday, April 07, 2026. The deemed date of allotment of bonus equity shares will be Wednesday, April 08, 2026.

  • Avax Apparels announces a 3:1 bonus issue of equity shares.
  • The record date for determining entitlement of shareholders is April 07, 2026.
  • The deemed date of allotment of bonus equity shares is April 08, 2026.
  • The face value of the equity shares is ₹5/-.
  • The company's CIN is L14101DL2005PLC137127 and the website is www.avaxapparels.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avax Apparels and Ornaments Ltd | Category: Bonus

item.title: [KAYNES] Kaynes Technology India Ltd's Managing Director Settles Show-Cause Notice with SEBI
item.description:
Kaynes Technology India Ltd has informed about the settlement procedure initiated by its then Managing Director, Mr. Ramesh Kunhikannan, against a show-cause notice received from SEBI. The Adjudicating Officer of SEBI passed a Settlement Order under the provisions of SEBI (Settlement Proceedings) Regulations, 2018. The Order was passed based on the violation of Regulations 3(5) under chapter II of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The Noticee paid a penalty of Rs. 23,42,600, which was paid from his personal account, hence there is no material impact on the financials or operations of the Company.

  • Kaynes Technology India Ltd's Managing Director settles show-cause notice with SEBI
  • Settlement Order passed under the provisions of SEBI (Settlement Proceedings) Regulations, 2018
  • Order passed based on the violation of Regulations 3(5) under chapter II of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Noticee paid a penalty of Rs. 23,42,600
  • No material impact on the financials or operations of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaynes Technology India Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [INFLAME] Inflame Appliances Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading Regulations Compliance
item.description:
Inflame Appliances Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Financial results for the half year and year ended on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities. All Designated persons and their immediate relatives have been informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period of closure.

  • Trading window closure from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after Financial results declaration
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Company’s Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities followed
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives informed not to trade during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Inflame Appliances Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TARC] Tarc Ltd Makes Interest Payment on NCDs
item.description:
Tarc Ltd has made an interest payment of INR 68,62,39,323 to its Non-Convertible Debenture holders. The interest payment was made on the 27th of October, 2026, ahead of the due date of 31st October, 2026. The frequency of interest payment is quarterly. No redemption payments were made.

  • Tarc Ltd pays INR 68,62,39,323 as interest on NCDs
  • Interest payment made on 27th October, 2026
  • Due date for interest payment was 31st October, 2026
  • Interest payment frequency is quarterly
  • No redemption payments were made

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tarc Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [IFINSEC] India Finsec Ltd: Promoter's Pledge on Shares Released
item.description:
The Exchange has received a revised disclosure from India Finsec Ltd regarding the release of pledge of Equity Shares. The disclosure is in accordance with Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure details the release of pledge of Equity Shares of India Finsec Limited.

  • Revised disclosure received by the Exchange from India Finsec Ltd.
  • Pledge of Equity Shares of India Finsec Limited has been released.
  • Disclosure is in accordance with SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011.
  • The release of pledge of Equity Shares has been duly reported.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA FINSEC LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [VIDLI] Trading Window for Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd to Close from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after Financial Results Declaration
item.description:
Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for promoters, directors, designated employees, connected persons, and insiders. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct. All officers and designated employees, including directors and auditors, have been informed not to trade (buy/sell/gift/pledge) or deal in the company's equity shares during this period.

  • Trading window closure for Vikram Kamats Hospitality Ltd from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure to last till 48 hours after financial results declaration for the quarter ending on 31st March, 2026
  • Decision in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Officers, designated employees, directors, auditors, and other insiders prohibited from trading during the closure period
  • Company's Managing Director, Dr. Vikram V. Kamat, has issued a formal notice regarding the closure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vidli Restaurants Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDCEMCAP] India Cements Capital Ltd Closes Trading Window for Share Dealing Until 48 Hours After Q4 and FY26 Results Announcement
item.description:
India Cements Capital Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares. The closure will be in effect from 01.04.2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ended 31.03.2026. This decision is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct, which regulates, monitors, and reports trading by designated persons. Directors, designated and connected persons are advised not to deal in the company's equity shares during the specified period.

  • India Cements Capital Ltd closes trading window for share dealing until 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 results announcement.
  • The closure is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct for designated persons.
  • Directors, designated and connected persons are advised not to deal in the company's equity shares during the closure period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA CEMENTS CAPITAL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CHARMS] Charms Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Charms Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all directors, designated employees, connected persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of audited Financial Results for the Fourth Quarter ended on March 31, 2026. The decision has been made in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The date of the board meeting for considering the audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Charms Industries Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026 till 48 hours after Q4 results declaration
  • Applies to directors, designated employees, connected persons, and their immediate relatives
  • In accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Date of board meeting for considering Q4 results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHARMS INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SVGLOBAL] S V Global Mill Ltd's Independent Directors Review Performance of Non-Independent Directors and Chairman
item.description:
S V Global Mill Ltd's Independent Directors held a meeting on 28th March 2026 to review the performance of non-independent directors and the board of directors for the financial year 2025-2026. The meeting also reviewed the performance of the Chairman and assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of the flow of information between the management and the company.

  • Independent Directors of S V Global Mill Ltd reviewed the performance of non-independent directors and the board of directors for the financial year 2025-2026
  • The performance of the Chairman of S V Global Mill Ltd was also reviewed
  • The quality, quantity, and timeliness of the flow of information between the management and the company was assessed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: S V GLOBAL MILL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZODIACLOTH] Zodiac Clothing Company Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Zodiac Clothing Company Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders, has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the company's securities. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter & financial year ended 31st March, 2026. This announcement applies to all Designated Persons of the Company and their immediate Relatives, as well as other insiders covered under the aforesaid Regulations and Code.

  • Zodiac Clothing Company Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after declaration of audited financial results
  • Applies to all Designated Persons of the Company and their immediate Relatives
  • Part of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZODIAC CLOTHING CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update
